geiger.hbm.title: GEIGER COUNTER
gui.hbm.rbmk.action.dump_power: Energy buffers full — route HE or power down.
gui.hbm.rbmk.action.raise_rods: Rods fully inserted — you can raise them.
gui.hbm.rbmk.az5_locked: AZ-5 cooling down – manual control disabled.
gui.hbm.rbmk.console.az5_hint: AZ-5: Trip every control rod immediately.
gui.hbm.rbmk.control.locked_hint: Manual override locked during SCRAM response.
gui.hbm.rbmk.control.missing_rod: Insert a control rod assembly to unlock manual control.
gui.hbm.rbmk.control.slider_hint: Manual override: drag the slider to adjust insertion depth.
gui.hbm.shredder.no_blade: Error: Shredder blades are broken or missing!
gui.hbm.tooltip_conveyor_router_button2: BLACKLIST: Route if filter doesn't match
gui.hbm.tooltip_conveyor_router_button3: WILDCARD: Route if no other route is valid
gui.hbm.tooltip_conveyor_router_warning: FULL! Please set one side to WILDCARD!
gui.hbm.tooltip_crucible_button1: Click this to show Recipe book.
item.hbm.billetflashlead_desc: The lattice decays, causing antimatter-matter$annihilation reactions, causing the release of$pions, decaying into muons, catalyzing fusion of$the nuclei, creating the new element.$Please try to keep up.
item.hbm.digamma_diagnostic.desc1: Sneak-right-click to read personal digamma exposure.
item.hbm.dosimeter.desc1: Passive Geiger counter tuned for environmental dose.
item.hbm.ingotasbestos_desc: §o"Filled with life, self-doubt and asbestos. That comes with the air."§r
item.hbm.meteor_remote_desc: Right click to summon a meteorite!
item.hbm.mp_fuselage_10_long_solid_sovie: Mp Fuselage 10 Long Solid Soviet Glory
item.hbm.powder_fire_desc: Used in multi purpose bombs:$Incendiary bombs are fun!
item.hbm.rbmk_tool.desc1: Sneak-right-click a RBMK column to store its location.
item.hbm.rbmk_tool.desc2: Then sneak-right-click a console/crane to force-link it.
item.hbm.rod_zirnox_natural_uranium_fuel: Zirnox Natural Uranium Fuel Depleted Rod
jei.hbm.machine_icf.info1: Multiblock: place the ICF Reactor facing an empty 17x7x17 chamber (offset one block forward) to auto-form the shell.
jei.hbm.machine_icf.info2: Coolant ports: top is cold input, bottom is hot output. Four diagonal service pylons (+/-6, +3, +/-3) also expose the fluid capability.
jei.hbm.machine_icf.info3: Load pellets into the five input slots; the core auto-feeds the active slot and converts 25 kHE of heat per mB into hot coolant.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_controller.info1: Acts as a heavy laser; supply up to 50,000,000 HE via cables or batteries.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_controller.info2: Right-click to rescan the target reactor, sneak-right-click to toggle. Needs a clear line-of-sight within 48 blocks.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_controller.info3: Each controller pushes up to 400,000 TU per tick. Soft blocks along the beam are vaporized automatically.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_press.info1: Combine an Empty ICF Pellet with two different fuels (cells/ingots) in the left and right inputs; the upper slots act as buffers.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_press.info2: Muon capsules charge the press for 16 uses and return an empty particle capsule in the lower-right slot.
jei.hbm.machine_icf_press.info3: Once both fuels are valid the press assembles a pellet automatically. Outputs can be extracted by hoppers or pipes.
message.hbm.chicago.status.breeder: Breeder channel: %1$s - Progress %2$s/%3$s (%4$s%%) - Last flux %5$s n/t
message.hbm.chicago.status.unknown: Chicago channel: no diagnostic data available.
tooltip.hbm.icf_controller: Right-click to align with the reactor. Sneak-right-click to toggle.
